title: FOIA - USMC records Vietnam War Barnum

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for subject below;
Name: Harvey C. Barnum
Branch: United States Marine Corps
DOB: July 21, 1940
Dates of Service: Approx 1962 to 1989

Please provide the following military service information:
1. Bronze Star Medal Award citations
2. Medal of Honor award citation 
3. copy of Navy commendation medal

Historical Documentation, Vietnam War military history
https://www.militarynews.com/norfolk-navy-flagship/news/top_stories/uss-harvey-c-barnum-jr-commissions/article_3b78f574-c67c-4b40-a330-a9b009cf91e1.html
Redact personal information such as SSN per 5 U.S.C. § 552(b)(6).

Please mail hardcopies to:
MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley

title: Mississippi Public Records Act request for law enforcement and jail records regarding Mr. Trumaine White (Amite County Sheriff’s Office)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I respectfully request copies of the following records regarding Mr. Trumaine White for the time
period of October 3, 2024 through October 4, 2024 (including responsive records in your
custody that were created by other law enforcement entities):
1. All incident reports
2. All arrest reports
3. All booking reports
4. All crime reports
5. All evidence reports
6. All records containing images or audio recordings of Mr. White. This includes all pictures
and all body, dash, security, and surveillance camera footage taken before, during, and after
his arrest; during transport; and while in and around the jail.
7. All 911 call logs, call audio, and call transcripts. If the audio or transcripts are not available,
please include times when the calls were placed, information provided to dispatch, and the
log of law enforcement actions/responses with time stamps.
As used above, the word “any” or “all” means “any and all.”

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jade Morgan

title: FOIA - US Navy ompf - Flight Demonstration Squadron CO

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FOIA - US Navy ompf - Flight Demonstration Squadron CO
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for David E. Koss.
Request copy of history of assignments NAVPERS form 1070/605, Legion of Merit award citations, Meritorious Service medal citation, Navy Commendation medal citations, navy Achievement Medal citation, Air Medal award citations, all award citations, Cumulative Record of Training (NAVPERS Form 5300/16), Adminstrative remarks NAVPERS 1070/613, dates of promotions.
Please redact any personal information per 5 U.S.C. § 552(b)(3) or 5 U.S.C. § 552(b)(6)

VETERAN INFORMATION
Name of veteran: David E. Koss
Branch of service: United States Navy
Rank: Captain O-6
Service: approx 1991 to 2013
Blue Angels
https://www.jacksonville.com/story/news/local/2010/07/21/orange-park-native-lead-blue-angels/15937844007/

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

On 4/13/26 the Village Board approved an Invoice Distribution Report dated April 13, 2026 that listed several “Budget Meetings” under Department 1010:Board & Commissions, 10-1010-40-4042. Therefore I request to see all original, itemized receipts for the following purchases AND copies of submitted expense reports indicating who submitted them AND,  for each of the meetings below, a LIST of which staffers and/or town officials attended each of these meetings:
Invoice No. 99202 - Budget Meeting - Blueberry Hill Cafe (3/24/2026, amount $53.08)
Invoice No. 69366 - Budget Meeting - Capri of Burr Ridge (3/9/2026, amount $924.56)
Invoice No. 000933 - Budget Meeting - Egg Harbor (3/3/2026, amount $41.14)
Invoice No. 046281 - Budget Meeting - Mariano’s (3/9/2026, amount $52.44)

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Anonymous User

title: REQUEST FOR RECORDS RICKEY LEE ZARSKY

communications.subject: Government Records Access and Management Act Request: REQUEST FOR RECORDS RICKEY LEE ZARSKY
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Government Records Access and Management Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting any records in the possesion of Weber County Sheriff's Office from 01/01/2025 through present date 04/17/2026  for inmate # 203791

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Annemarie Grant
